rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Declare constants and equations with valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions
Stateful equations should use temporal recurrence patterns like `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Conditional logic in AGREE uses nested `if ... then ... else` expressions
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not invent new identifiers not present in the visible component scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
